MINI MINUTES: This cause assigned to Dept. 218 for Settlement Conference. Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Eric Throne. Arnold W. Evje, Esq. appeared for Plaintiff, Dean M. Gridley and Gabriela Giacoman, Esq. appeared for Defendant, Carey Mahaney. The matter did not settle, trial date is confirmed.
